# Model Card Template

`<model_name>`

## Target

`<target metric>`

```text
feature list
```

```text
platforms
```


## Intended use

```text
draft scoring
live breakout prediction
diagnostics
variant ranking
```

## Not intended use

```text
policy evasion
guaranteed virality claim
platform manipulation
commercial TRIBE use without license review
```

## Known limitations

```text
data sparsity
platform drift
creator-specific bias
trend drift
metric availability
```

## Deployment decision

```text
approved / rejected / research only
```
